title: Dungeon Shader Forge: Ion-Powered Lens Enchantment
description: Inside a dark dungeon, the player uses an Ion Drive engine to channel energy beams into enchanted sunglasses, mixing custom shader effects on both objects. Each energy channel applies a distinct post-processing shader layer (chromatic aberration, heat distortion, glow, dissolve, scan-lines, refraction) to the sunglasses lenses, with conservation of total energy across channels. The player must couple multiple inputs, undo/redo shader configurations, and balance energy to unlock a final combined shader effect.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 (importmap from cdn.jsdelivr.net) implementing a dungeon shader forge scene. Load dungeon_warkarma.glb as the environment scaled to fill the scene, place PrimaryIonDrive.glb on the left as an energy source, and SunglassesKhronos.glb on the right as the enchantment target. Use a perspective camera at (0,1.5,4) looking at center, with dim ambient light (0x222244) and a point light on the ion drive (0x00ccff). Implement 6 shader energy channels as a UI panel: chromatic aberration, heat distortion, emissive glow, dissolve noise, scan-lines, and refraction. Each channel has a slider (0-100). Enforce a conservation law: total energy across all 6 sliders must equal exactly 300. Adjusting one slider auto-reduces others proportionally. Write custom ShaderMaterial for the sunglasses lenses that combines all 6 effects based on current slider values as uniforms, blending them in the fragment shader using mix functions. The ion drive should emit visible beam particles (Points with custom vertex shader) toward the sunglasses, colored by the dominant active channel. Clicking the ion drive toggles its spin animation and beam on/off. Clicking the sunglasses cycles lens tint between 4 presets (amber, cyan, magenta, neutral) which multiplies with shader effects. Implement undo/redo buttons (Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Y) storing up to 20 snapshots of all slider values plus lens tint state. Add a reset button restoring defaults (all sliders at 50, neutral tint). Display current total energy and a status label. When any 3 channels exceed 70 simultaneously (impossible under conservation), show a warning. Add orbit controls constrained to stay inside the dungeon. All shader uniforms update in real-time via requestAnimationFrame. The fragment shader on lenses must use at least 3 noise functions and time-based animation for dissolve and distortion effects.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  chromaticAberration: number,         // chromatic aberration channel energy level 0-100
  heatDistortion: number,         // heat distortion channel energy level 0-100
  emissiveGlow: number,         // emissive glow channel energy level 0-100
  dissolveNoise: number,         // dissolve noise channel energy level 0-100
  scanLines: number,         // scan-lines channel energy level 0-100
  refraction: number,         // refraction channel energy level 0-100
  totalEnergy: number,         // sum of all channel energies, must equal 300
  ionDriveSpinning: boolean,         // whether ion drive is spinning
  beamActive: boolean,         // whether energy beam particles are visible
  dominantChannel: string,         // name of channel with highest energy value
  sunglassesRotationSpeed: number,         // angular velocity of sunglasses rotation in rad/s
  particleCount: number,         // number of active beam particles in scene
}
